description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a dark, weathered finish and visible greenish stains or discolorations on the surface. The desk features a set of four drawers on the right side, each with a metallic handle, and a central shallow drawer beneath the main work surface. The left side of the desk is solid, while the back is partially open with horizontal support bars for structural stability. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for writing or placing equipment, and the overall construction appears sturdy and utilitarian. The desk shows signs of wear, suggesting it has been used in a rugged or industrial environment. Its design is practical, prioritizing storage and durability over decorative elements.
description: A large, dark wooden desk with four right-side drawers, a central drawer, and a weathered, stained surface. The design is sturdy and utilitarian, with visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four right-side drawers with metal handles and the central drawer beneath the desktop.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the solid side panel and the full length of the desktop, with visible surface stains.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open back with horizontal support bars and the solid left panel.
description_view_3: Left side view highlighting the solid left panel and the stained desktop surface.
attribute_orientation: The side with the four drawers and central drawer is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk, while the open back with support bars is the rear.
attribute_usage_context: workbench for manual tasks or paperwork in a garage or industrial setting
